summary: Verified task-2 spec: after 1 or 2 review FAILs the task is NOT blocked — retry continues normally. The existing implementation in bin/lib/review-escalation.mjs (shouldEscalate uses reviewRounds >= 3) already satisfies the spec. Test at test/review-escalation.test.mjs:274-282 asserts reviewRounds=1 → shouldEscalate=false → status='in_progress'; test at :284-299 asserts the same for 2 FAILs. Captured targeted test output (30/30 pass) and full suite (581/581 pass) as auditable artifacts.
